evals.prompt: Create a table showing users with columns: name, email, status. Add pagination and make status sortable.
evals.expected_output: IGRPDataTable with columns using IGRPDataTableHeaderDefault for sortable status, IGRPDataTableCellBadge for status, showPagination.

evals.prompt: Add a data table with expandable rows. Each row shows a summary; expanding shows a details section.
evals.expected_output: IGRPDataTable with getRowCanExpand, renderSubComponent, IGRPDataTableCellExpander in a column.

evals.prompt: Create a products table with name (link to detail), price (formatted currency), and actions dropdown (Edit, Delete).
evals.expected_output: IGRPDataTable with IGRPDataTableCellLink, IGRPDataTableCellAmount, IGRPDataTableDropdownMenu with link and alert items.
